---
title: "Xueqian (Chelsea) Chen"
about:
  template: broadside
  image: images/profile.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: quequeque1220@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/chen11760
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com.hk/citations?user=GfMZzOMAAAAJ&hl

---



I am a PhD Candidate in Sociology at The Ohio State University, specializing in family demography, social stratification, and life course research. My work examines how inequality is produced and reproduced through family processes, with particular attention to rising wealth inequality and the ways families are embedded within and shaped by changing structures of economic inequality.

## Research Interests

- Family demography
- Social stratification
- Wealth, debt, & asset
- Gender inequality
- Life course
- Causal inference

## Education

**The Ohio State University** | PhD in Sociology | Expected 2028

**Peking University** | MA in Demography | 2022

**Nanjing University** | BA in Sociology | 2019
